Premium Gift Set: Our soap fragrance oil includes an easy-to-use dropper for diffuser, a 10ml glass amber bottle and an easy-to-dispense Euro dropper cap, which is the best gift for Christmas, Anniversaries, Holidays, Teachers Day, Father's Day, Mother's Day, Valentine's Day, Birthday and more.
description: Product Description Why choose Lagunamoon Fragrance Oil Gift Sets? Natural & safe No Paraben, No Additives Long-lasting Scent DIY Handmade & Skin Care Ideal Gift Set ABOUT Lagunamoon FRAGRANCE OILS SET We at Lagunamoon believe that beauty comes not only from the outside but also from the inside. It really should co-exist in harmony within the healthy body and mind. So we aim to bring beauty seekers like you unique natural goodness, through our newest and most affordable product lines in home and fashion. Package Including: 1 x 16Pcs Fragrance Oils(10ml) 1 x Gift Box For candle making After rigorous testing and quality control, our perfume oil can be used in the production of various candles, allowing you to enjoy the fun of DIY. For soap making Fragrance oils gift sets are good for making soap, and can also be used in shampoos, lotions, creams, perfumes. DIY Bath Bombs Our fragrance oils can use for DIY bath bombs, body and facial cream and so on. You can easily create your own favorite scent and enjoy the fun of handmade. For diffusers Add 3-5 drops fragrance oils in the diffuser at night, will make you breathe smooth and have a good sleep. Candle fragrance oil includes 16 scents: Gardenia, Parma Violet, Sea Breeze, Forrester, Rosemary, Black Orchid, Cinnamon, Freesia, Ginger, Ylang Ylang, Fresh Liner, Jasmine, Lily, Sandalwood, Peppermint, Honeysuckle. Our soap fragrance oil is natural and it includes an easy-to-use dropper for the diffuser, a 10ml glass amber bottle and an easy-to-dispense Euro dropper cap, can use it conveniently and control the dosage. Lagunamoon fragrance oil set can add on laundry to create a charming scent, which long-lasting and lets you relaxed to keep a good mood all day. Fragrance Oil Sets are perfect gifts for any occasion, like Birthday, Valentine's Day, Mother's Day, Thanksgiving Day, Christmas Day, New Year's Day.
